KPI Bluebook
============

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Key Performance Indicators:

   ethylene_yield_percentage
   propylene_to_ethylene_pe_ratio
   daily_feedstock_throughput_tonsday
   specific_steam_consumption_tonton
   energy_intensity_index_eii
   cooling_water_deltat_c
   mean_time_between_failures_mtbf
   overall_equipment_effectiveness_oee
   pump_vibration_anomaly_rate
   lost_time_injury_frequency_rate_ltifr
   sox_emissions_concentration_kgm³
   flare_gas_recovery_rate
   polymer_melt_flow_index_mfi_variance
   onspec_production_percentage
   specific_catalyst_cost_ton
   maintenance_to_operating_cost_ratio
